title: Terra: Core
body:
# Welcome to Terra: Core
![Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e352970b0bdc1147bb8399727df3cbd64188495d.webp)
A more lightweight alternative to my other modpack, [Neodymium](https://modrinth.com/modpack/neodymium)!
Better performance, quite a few features and same stunning terrain gen!

![A Dense dark forest, flora everywhere](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/qmiHFnG4/images/4b455e22b2952916ce1b2d616080a7d4e348fb6b.png)


![Stunning Cliffsides](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/qmiHFnG4/images/deef0be2a3b6c510288e92fa3d82b5b82d235df4.png)

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/041291a109ce11da773dbbd940ffe19044f6f423.webp)

1. Powerful, Beautiful world gen engine with Terralith and Tectonic! Includes over 85 biomes!
2. Completely Remastered End/Nether Gen!
3. Many New Mobs!

![A Vast landscape awaits!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/qmiHFnG4/images/5ae3cbdff2964f23f7d91029b361eb6fa509de7c.png)

**Like this project? Check out my other projects [here!](https://modrinth.com/user/raamviot50)**

# Need a server?
[![BisectHosting partnership](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/058a85f687af11b58e726a88197c54a4005dbde1.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/raamviot50)

As a bypass to UBlock origin blocking server sponsor banners, I have to put this text here.
Please tell them to revert this change [here.](https://github.com/uBlockOrigin/uAssets/issues/24130)
